evidence: valueTypeName emits unit return type; validateAbiValueType rejects Unit parameters and validateValueType rejects stored Unit; Tests/PsyDiagnostics.lean covers Unit parameter rejection.
valueTypeName, literal, predicates, assertions, and ExpressionPredicateProbe cover Bool values.
valueTypeName, literal, casts, U32ArithmeticProbe, U32HashPackingProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe cover U32 values.
valueTypeName lowers U64 to Felt; Counter, ArithmeticProbe, ArrayProbe, and storage fixtures cover Felt values.
valueTypeName, literal hash4, HashProbe, MapProbe, and U32HashPackingProbe cover Hash values.
valueTypeName and array literal/index lowering are covered by ArrayProbe, StructArrayProbe, AbiAggregateProbe, NestedAggregateProbe, and U32HashPackingProbe.
structDecl, struct literals, field access, ABI structs, and storage structs are covered by StructProbe, StructArrayProbe, AbiAggregateProbe, NestedAggregateProbe, and StorageNestedAggregateProbe.
stateDecl and scalar storage effects are covered by Counter, ConditionalProbe, StructProbe, and StorageNestedAggregateProbe.
validateState accepts only Map<Hash, Hash, N>; MapProbe covers the supported shape and Tests/PsyDiagnostics.lean covers unsupported map shapes.
stateDecl and storage-array effects are covered by ArrayProbe, StructArrayProbe, StorageNestedAggregateProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe.
literal emits Nu32 and is covered by U32ArithmeticProbe, U32HashPackingProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe.
literal emits Felt numerals and is covered by Counter, ArithmeticProbe, ArrayProbe, and storage fixtures.
literal emits true/false and is covered by AssertProbe and ExpressionPredicateProbe.
literal emits Hash four-limb arrays and is covered by HashProbe and MapProbe.
contextFunction lowers to get_user_id and ContextProbe covers it.
contextFunction lowers to get_contract_id and ContextProbe covers it.
contextFunction lowers to get_checkpoint_id and ContextProbe covers it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to +=; U32ArithmeticProbe and StorageNestedAggregateProbe cover it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to -=; U32ArithmeticProbe and StorageNestedAggregateProbe cover it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to *=; U32ArithmeticProbe covers it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to /=; U32ArithmeticProbe covers it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to %=; U32ArithmeticProbe covers it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to &=; BitwiseProbe covers it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to |=; BitwiseProbe covers it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to ^=; BitwiseProbe covers it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to <<=; BitwiseProbe covers it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to >>=; BitwiseProbe covers it.
lowerExpr delegates to literal; all fixtures use literal expressions.
lowerExpr emits local names; most fixtures use local bindings.
lowerExpr emits fixed array literals; ArrayProbe, StructArrayProbe, NestedAggregateProbe, and U32HashPackingProbe cover them.
lowerExpr emits fixed array indexing; ArrayProbe, StructArrayProbe, NestedAggregateProbe, and U32HashPackingProbe cover it.
lowerExpr emits new Struct literals; StructProbe, StructArrayProbe, AbiAggregateProbe, and NestedAggregateProbe cover it.
lowerExpr emits field access; StructProbe, StructArrayProbe, AbiAggregateProbe, and NestedAggregateProbe cover it.
lowerExpr emits addition; ArithmeticProbe and U32ArithmeticProbe cover it.
lowerExpr emits subtraction with operand parenthesization; ArithmeticProbe and U32ArithmeticProbe cover it.
lowerExpr emits multiplication; ArithmeticProbe and U32ArithmeticProbe cover it.
lowerExpr emits division; U32ArithmeticProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits modulo; U32ArithmeticProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits exponentiation; U32ArithmeticProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits bitwise and; BitwiseProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits bitwise or; BitwiseProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits bitwise xor; BitwiseProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits shift-left; BitwiseProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits shift-right; BitwiseProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits casts after ensureCastType validation; U32ArithmeticProbe, BitwiseProbe, U32HashPackingProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe cover casts.
lowerExpr emits equality; ExpressionPredicateProbe and AssertProbe cover it.
lowerExpr emits inequality; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits less-than; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits less-or-equal; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits greater-than; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits greater-or-equal; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits boolean and; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits boolean or; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits boolean not; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits dynamic Hash construction; U32HashPackingProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits hash intrinsic; HashProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits hash_two_to_one intrinsic; HashProbe covers it.
lowerExpr delegates to lowerEffectExpr, which validates expression-only effects and rejects statement-only effects; effect fixtures and diagnostics cover the split.
lowerEffectExpr emits scalar .get(); Counter, ConditionalProbe, StructProbe, and diagnostics cover expression/statement use.
lowerEffectStmt emits scalar assignment; Counter, ConditionalProbe, StructProbe, and diagnostics cover expression misuse.
lowerEffectStmt emits scalar compound assignment; StorageNestedAggregateProbe covers supported use and diagnostics cover expression misuse/type mismatch.
lowerEffectExpr emits Map.contains; MapProbe covers it.
lowerEffectExpr emits Map.get; MapProbe covers it.
lowerEffectExpr and lowerEffectStmt emit Map.insert; MapProbe covers expression insert.
lowerEffectStmt emits Map.set; MapProbe covers it.
lowerEffectExpr emits array .get(), with U32 casts when needed; ArrayProbe and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
lowerEffectStmt emits array assignment, with U32 casts when needed; ArrayProbe and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
lowerEffectExpr emits storage struct-array field .get(); StructArrayProbe covers it.
lowerEffectStmt emits storage struct-array field assignment; StructArrayProbe covers it.
lowerEffectExpr emits scalar storage struct field .get(); StructProbe covers it.
lowerEffectStmt emits scalar storage struct field assignment; StructProbe covers it.
lowerStoragePathRead emits generic scalar, array, and map storage paths; MapProbe, StorageNestedAggregateProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
lowerStoragePathWrite emits generic scalar, array, and map storage path writes; MapProbe, StorageNestedAggregateProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
lowerStoragePathAssignOp emits supported scalar/array storage compound assignment and rejects map/U32 paths; StorageNestedAggregateProbe and diagnostics cover the boundary.
lowerEffectExpr emits context functions; ContextProbe covers it.
lowerStoragePathSegment emits field access; StorageNestedAggregateProbe covers it.
lowerStoragePathSegment emits index access; StorageNestedAggregateProbe and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
lowerStoragePathRead/lowerStoragePathWrite handle mapKey at the map boundary; MapProbe covers it.
lowerStatement emits immutable let; most fixtures cover it.
lowerStatement emits mutable let; U32ArithmeticProbe, BitwiseProbe, and NestedAggregateProbe cover it.
lowerStatement emits assignment to local, array index, or field path; U32ArithmeticProbe, BitwiseProbe, and NestedAggregateProbe cover it.
lowerStatement emits compound assignment; U32ArithmeticProbe and BitwiseProbe cover it.
lowerStatement delegates to lowerEffectStmt, which rejects expression-only effects; storage fixtures and diagnostics cover it.
lowerStatement emits assert; AssertProbe and ExpressionPredicateProbe cover it.
lowerStatement emits assert_eq; AssertProbe and most executable fixtures cover it.
lowerStatement emits Psy if/else statement; ConditionalProbe covers it.
lowerStatement emits static Psy for loop; LoopProbe covers it.
lowerStatement emits return and validateEntrypointBodies requires non-Unit returns to end with return; all returning fixtures and diagnostics cover it.
